rawOutputHead:
{
  "verdict": "needs-attention",
  "summary": "The v0.4.0→v0.4.6 cumulative diff introduces a retry/backoff layer (retry.mjs), BigModel error dispatch (bigmodel-errors.mjs), and tracked-jobs state management that have several material gaps: incomplete coverage of non-idempotent retry scenarios, TOCTOU race potential in job state, and silent failure modes in error classification. These are the kinds of bugs that hide until production stress. Recommend addressing before shipping v0.4.7.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "title": "retry.mjs may non-idempotently retry operations that already partially succeeded",
      "body": "The retry module (scripts/lib/retry.mjs) implements exponential backoff with jitter for BigModel API calls. However, if the underlying operation (e.g., job submission via glm-client.mjs) completes server-side but the response is lost (network timeout), the retry will re-submit, creating duplicate jobs. There is no idempotency key or request dedup mechanism visible in glm-client.mjs or the retry wrapper. For a job submission system, duplicate jobs mean wasted compute, duplicate outputs, and confused users.",
      "file": "scripts/lib/retry.mjs",
      "line_start": 1,
      "line_end": 203,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "recommendation": "Add an idempotency-key header to retried requests (derive from a hash of request body + nonce), or mark the first attempt's state before retry so the server can deduplicate. At minimum, document which operations are safe to retry and guard non-idempotent paths."
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "title": "Tracked-jobs state file has TOCTOU race under concurrent invocations",
      "body": "scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs reads and writes a shared state file (likely JSON on disk) without file locking. If two glm-companion processes run concurrently (e.g., two terminal windows), both can read the same state, each append their job, and the last writer wins — silently dropping the other process's job from tracking. This is a classic TOCTOU race. The tracked-jobs module was significantly rewritten in this diff (+78/- lines).",
      "file": "scripts/lib/tracked-jobs.mjs",
      "line_start": 1,
      "line_end": 78,
      "confidence": 0.82,
      "recommendation": "Use atomic file writes (write to temp file, then rename) plus an advisory lock (flock, or lockfile with PID). Alternatively, use a per-process job list and merge on read, or move to a proper per-job file scheme (one file per job in a directory) to avoid contention entirely."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "bigmodel-errors.mjs error classification may silently swallow unexpected errors",
      "body": "scripts/lib/bigmodel-errors.mjs (168 new lines) classifies BigModel API errors to decide retry vs. fail-fast behavior. If the error shape doesn't match any known pattern (e.g., a new error type from an API version bump, or a proxy/middleware error), the classifier likely falls through to a default that either retries incorrectly or raises a generic message, losing the original error context. The test file (tests/bigmodel-errors.test.mjs) only covers known error types — there is no test for the 'unknown error shape' scenario.",
      "file": "scripts/lib/bigmodel-errors.mjs",
      "line_start": 1,
      "line_end": 168,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "recommendation": "Add an explicit 'unknown/unclassifiable' branch that logs the full raw error (including headers and body) at WARN level, does NOT retry (to avoid amplifying unknown failures), and surfaces the original error to the caller. Add a test case with a completely unexpected error shape."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "process.mjs deleted but may still be imported at runtime",
      "body": "scripts/lib/process.mjs (67 lines deleted) was removed in this diff, likely replaced by retry.mjs. However, if any other module, test, or dynamic import path still references 'scripts/lib/process.mjs', it will throw a ModuleNotFoundError at runtime — not at import time if the reference is lazy/dynamic. The diff shows scripts/lib/render.mjs was modified, which may have been the primary consumer, but grep for all imports of process.mjs was not confirmed against the full codebase.",
      "file": "scripts/lib/process.mjs",
      "line_start": 1,
      "line_end": 67,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "recommendation": "Search the entire codebase (including test files, CI scripts, and markdown command files that may reference it) for any remaining import of 'process.mjs' or 'lib/process'. If found, update to use the new module. Add a CI check that validates all imports resolve (the existing check-imports.mjs may cover this — verify it runs against the deleted file path)."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "glm-client.mjs expanded surface area without observable timeout/connectivity hardening",
      "body": "scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs grew by ~155 lines in this diff, adding retry integration and error dispatch. However, there is no visible timeout configuration for the underlying HTTP requests. If the BigModel API hangs (not errors, just goes silent), the retry layer will wait for the full socket timeout on each attempt before backing off and retrying, potentially blocking the CLI for minutes. The retry.test.mjs (352 lines) tests retry timing but does not appear to test the interaction between HTTP-level timeouts and retry-level timeouts.",
      "file": "scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs",
      "line_start": 1,
      "line_end": 155,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "recommendation": "Add explicit per-request timeout (e.g., AbortController with a reasonable default like 30s) to every outbound HTTP call in glm-client.mjs. Ensure the retry layer respects and propagates timeout errors correctly. Add a test that verifies a hung connection is aborted within the expected timeout window, not after N retries × full socket timeout."
    }
  ],
  "next_steps": [
    "Inspect scripts/lib/retry.mjs and scripts/lib/glm-client.mjs to confirm the idempotency gap — check if any request header or payload key prevents duplicate submissions on retry.",
    "Verify tracked-jobs.mjs uses atomic writes (write-then-rename) or per-job files — run two concurrent job submissions and check state file integrity.",
    "Add a test to bigmodel-errors.test.mjs for an unrecognized error shape and confirm it fails safe (no retry, full error preserved).",
    "Grep entire repo for 'process\\.mjs' to confirm no dangling imports from the deleted module.",
    "Check if glm-client.mjs sets any request timeout; if not, add one before shipping."
  ]
}
}
